title: ProviderSeam
description: Schema for a Provider Seam — defines the transport contract between Odin and a model provider. No provider execution in this contract.

seam_id.description: Unique identifier for this provider seam

seam_class.description: Class of the provider seam (e.g. mock_provider, local_ollama_candidate)

transport_contract.description: Transport contract identifier governing this seam

execution_policy.description: Execution policy for this seam (e.g. no_execution_this_pr)

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this seam does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — provider seam is a transport contract, not provider execution

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this seam does not claim or prove
